items.title: Data Analyst
items.description: We need a data analyst with strong SQL, Power BI dashboards and Excel reporting for stakeholder reporting across finance. Remote for LATAM candidates welcome. You will own data analysis and dashboarding end to end with our analytics team every week.
items.label: relevant

items.title: Business Intelligence Analyst
items.description: BI Analyst role: build Power BI and Tableau dashboards, write advanced SQL queries, partner with product for stakeholder reporting and data analysis. Python is a plus. Hybrid in Bogota with flexible days.
items.label: relevant

items.title: Analytics Analyst
items.description: Analytics analyst position focused on SQL modeling, Excel automation, dashboarding in Power BI and clear communication with stakeholders. Remote worldwide, async-first company.
items.label: relevant

items.title: Product Analyst
items.description: Product analyst working with SQL, experimentation, funnels and dashboards. Python for deeper analysis. Remote across the Americas, reporting to head of product analytics.
items.label: relevant

items.title: Junior Data Analyst
items.description: Entry role: SQL queries, Excel reports, Power BI dashboards under mentorship. Great for junior profiles who love data analysis and stakeholder reporting. Remote LATAM.
items.label: relevant

items.title: Data Analyst (Marketing)
items.description: Analyze campaign data with SQL and Google Analytics, build Power BI dashboards, present insights to marketing stakeholders. Remote friendly within Colombia.
items.label: relevant

items.title: BI Analyst
items.description: SQL, dbt models, Tableau and Power BI reporting. Data analysis for operations, building a metrics layer with the data team. Remote worldwide with quarterly meetups.
items.label: relevant

items.title: Senior Director of Analytics
items.description: Executive leadership for the analytics organization: strategy, hiring, budget ownership, board reporting. Requires 15 years leading large data teams and deep SQL heritage.
items.label: not_relevant

items.title: Data Analyst
items.description: Onsite-only data analyst role in Munich headquarters. SQL and Power BI required, daily presence in office, no remote option at all.
items.label: not_relevant

items.title: Unpaid Data Intern
items.description: Unpaid internship helping with Excel spreadsheets and SQL exports. Great learning opportunity for students, no compensation offered.
items.label: not_relevant

items.title: Backend Engineer (Go)
items.description: Design and ship Go microservices, gRPC APIs, Kubernetes deployments and infrastructure automation. No analytics involved, deep systems programming role.
items.label: not_relevant

items.title: Sales Development Representative
items.description: Pure outbound sales: cold calls, quota, CRM hygiene and pipeline generation. Zero technical or analytical work involved in this role.
items.label: not_relevant

items.title: Data Analyst
items.description: This position was filled. SQL Power BI dashboards stakeholder reporting.
items.label: not_relevant

items.title: Marketing Manager
items.description: Own brand campaigns, budgets and agencies. Some dashboard consumption but no hands-on data work. Hybrid in Mexico City.
items.label: not_relevant

items.title: Financial Analyst
items.description: Budgeting, forecasting and variance analysis in Excel with heavy stakeholder reporting; SQL used occasionally for pulls. Remote within LATAM.
items.label: relevant

items.title: Data Engineer
items.description: Build Airflow pipelines, Spark jobs, dbt models and warehouse infrastructure in Snowflake. SQL heavy but engineering focused, on-call rotation included. Remote worldwide.
items.label: not_relevant

items.title: Analista de Datos
items.description: Buscamos analista de datos con SQL avanzado, dashboards en Power BI, reportes en Excel y comunicación con stakeholders. Remoto para Colombia con contrato a término indefinido.
items.label: relevant

items.title: Data Analyst
items.description: SQL and dashboards role with no stated location details anywhere.
items.label: relevant

items.title: Head of Data
items.description: Executive hire owning the entire data organization, strategy and a 40 person team. Deep leadership requirements.
items.label: not_relevant

items.title: Customer Support Specialist
items.description: Answer tickets, manage escalations, document knowledge base. Zero analytics content. Remote LATAM with rotating weekend shifts.
items.label: not_relevant
